name: Dog Fest Beef Slices 55G
description: High in protein, tender beef slices are a perfect reward for dog training. You can decide yourself how big is the piece your pooch should get. Just don't get them spoiled. Composition: beef, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 28, crude fat 5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4.5, moisture 23.
